import json
with open\('events.jsonl'\) as f:
    for i, line in enumerate\(f, 1\):
        try:
            e = json.loads\(line\)
            t = e.get\('type',''\)
            item = e.get\('item',{}\)
            it = item.get\('type',''\)
            status = item.get\('status',''\)
            iid = item.get\('id',''\)
            if it == 'file_change':
                changes = item.get\('changes',[]\)
                paths = [c.get\('path',''\).split\('/'\)[-1] for c in changes]
                print\(f'{i:3d} {t:20s} {it:20s} {status:12s} {paths}'\)
            elif it == 'command_execution':
                cmd = item.get\('command',''\)[:80]
                print\(f'{i:3d} {t:20s} {it:20s} {status:12s} {cmd}'\)
            elif it == 'reasoning':
                txt = item.get\('text',''\)[:60]
                print\(f'{i:3d} {t:20s} {it:20s}              {txt}'\)
            elif it == 'todo_list':
                items = item.get\('items',[]\)
                done = sum\(1 for x in items if x.get\('completed'\)\)
                print\(f'{i:3d} {t:20s} {it:20s}              {done}/{len\(items\)} done'\)
            else:
                print\(f'{i:3d} {t:20s} {it or t:20s} {status}'\)
        except: print\(f'{i:3d} parse error'\)
")
